title: Quantification of Cell Death and Cytotoxicity Using LDH-Glo™ Cytotoxicity Assay
author: Elena Coccia

steps.title: Harvest conditioned media from cell cultures
steps.instruction: Harvest conditioned media from cell cultures.

steps.title: Collect 2 μL of conditioned media from each well
steps.instruction: Collect 2 μL of conditioned media from each well.

steps.title: Dilute the collected media in 298...
steps.instruction: Dilute the collected media in 298 μL of storage buffer (200 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.3, 10% glycerol, 1% BSA).

steps.title: Perform the assay according to the manufacturer's instructions
steps.instruction: Perform the assay according to the manufacturer's instructions.

steps.title: Thaw stored samples and mix gently
steps.instruction: Thaw stored samples and mix gently.

steps.title: Transfer 50 μL of each diluted...
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 μL of each diluted sample into a 96-well plate.

steps.title: Add 50 μL of LDH detection...
steps.instruction: Add 50 μL of LDH detection reagent to each well (1:1 ratio).

steps.title: Incubate the plate at room temperature for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate the plate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
1. Measure luminescence using a plate reader.
